description: Lumminary provides a platform for third parties to access customer-authorized genetic data and submit related reports. Its published integration materials describe partner access to datasets through a secured API and companion client/toolkit repositories.
summary: Lumminary exposes one partner REST API at `https://api.lumminary.com/v1`, authenticated with a Lumminary-issued API key plus product UUID; no public GraphQL, MCP, or standalone CLI surface was found.
